name: MixtarRVS Base Closure 0008
purpose: Install the first MixtarRVS network profile layer under /System, exposing interface, route, DNS, Wi-Fi, DHCP, and remote-access status through a Mixtar-owned command while keeping dhcpcd, iwd, OpenSSH, and OpenRC as explicit compatibility backends.
non_goals: Do not restart dhcpcd, iwd, dbus, sshd, or OpenRC.
Do not change Wi-Fi credentials or iwd state.
Do not change IP addresses, routes, or DNS.
Do not replace dhcpcd or iwd yet.
Do not remove apk or Alpine packages.
known_limitations: mixtar-network is a profile/status layer, not a native network daemon.
dhcpcd remains the live DHCP and resolver backend.
iwd remains the live Wi-Fi backend.
OpenSSH remains the live remote-access backend.
Network profile application is not implemented yet; this stage only audits and describes current state.
